/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/external/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/graphics/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/graphics/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/graphics/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/graphics/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/graphics/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/core/Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/graphics/Texture.cpp.o -o OpenGLProject  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libassimp.6.0.4.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
